scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const paths = ['node_modules/nativewind/node_modules/react', 'node_modules/nativewind/node_modules/react-dom', 'node_modules/nativewind/node_modules/react-native']; paths.forEach(p => { if (fs.existsSync(p)) fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); });"
